title: Share of Voice
html:
Share of Voice

Rankett's central scoring metric — a numeric measure of how often a brand is cited by AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Grok, DeepSeek, Google AI Overviews) when users ask buying-intent questions in the brand's category, weighted against competitors. Share-of-voice is what visibility compresses into for the AI Visibility Engine dashboard. The audit-fix-rescore loop measures it; the ghost white label dashboard surfaces it; the whitelabel partner sells against the delta over time.

The metric appears as an explicit product directive in 2026 01 13 rankett com — "fix it so that we have the 'Share of voice' section. more of like a central score" — meaning by mid-January 2026 Yahir is consolidating multiple sub-scores (per-platform breakdowns, gap analyses, citation counts) into a single 0–100 share-of-voice number that becomes the headline metric an agency client sees first. The decision is meaningful: a single central score is easier to sell, easier to track over time, and easier to whitelabel than a multi-dimensional dashboard. Same instinct that drives the broader ghost white label commitment to invisibility — strip the noise, surface the one number that matters.

The intellectual foundation lives in 2026 02 28 proven playbook, the research-anchored fulfillment doc. The 680M+ citation analysis named there shows that brand search volume is the strongest predictor of LLM citations and that being on 4+ platforms 2.8x's the odds of showing up in ChatGPT — meaning share-of-voice is mechanistically a function of off-site brand presence (multi-platform mentions, third-party authority placements, content depth) rather than on-page SEO tricks. The seoClarity AI Overview overlap study cited in the same doc — ">50% of AIO citations come from URLs already ranking in top 20" — confirms the metric is downstream of broader search-equity, not a separate game. Share-of-voice is therefore not a gimmick metric; it's a summary metric.

The first-batch meta-summary ( first batch 2026 04 26) places share-of-voice in the spine of the corpus alongside ai search optimization and whitelabel strategy as one of the 2026 mantras ("share-of-voice" — listed alongside ai search optimization and whitelabel strategy as the 2026 era's defining vocabulary). The lineage runs cleanly: asking the right question (2022) → nonobvious (2022) → ai search optimization (2023-2026) → share-of-voice (2026, the operationalized scorecard).
